title: lepidium foliosum
intro: Lepidium foliosum, also known as pepperwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidium foliosum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
